items.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Valuation Check After AI Data Center Strength And Record Power And Energy Results
items.description: Caterpillar (CAT) is back in focus after quarterly results highlighted record sales and outperformance in its Power & Energy segment, which is tied closely to large AI data center projects and supported by a record backlog for future activity. See our latest analysis for Caterpillar. The latest earnings and AI data center wins have fed directly into the share price, with Caterpillar’s 1-month share price return of 21.74% and 1-year total shareholder return of 102.32% pointing to strong...

items.title: Review & Preview: 50,000 Sighs of Relief
items.description: After a tumultuous week, stocks staged an impressive rebound, sending the Dow above 50,000 for the first time ever.
